title: celosia scabra
intro: Celosia scabra, also known as the woolflower or woolly celosia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the amaranth family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing swelling, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Celosia scabra is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
